title: Message Envelopes, Bytes, and Schema Evolution · Runtime Contract: Envelope Identity Causality

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Predict Envelope Identity Causality · Theory Envelope Identity Causality
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go messaging team handles case 3518 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound bytes and validate content metadata, identity, and version before decoding effects; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then lower the byte and goroutine budget and preserve rejection evidence. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
